metadata.description: Custom Claude Code skills by Sam Boland

plugins.name: malware-static-analysis
plugins.description: Automated static malware analysis pipeline for Windows PE binaries. Runs pefile, YARA, and Ghidra headless decompilation, queries VirusTotal, and generates a comprehensive markdown report. STATIC ANALYSIS ONLY — never executes the target binary.

plugins.name: team
plugins.description: 2-person dev team workflow skills: file-or-forge task ledger, identity-aware triage, end-of-session closeout, bidirectional GH/GitLab issue sync. Five commands (hi / task / sync / bye / help). Supports peer mode (equal partners) and boss-employee mode (top-down assignment with boss-friendly GH UI workflow). Config-driven; no hardcoded names.
